ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scene_categories" (
  "scene_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene category */,
  "scene_description" TEXT /* Description of the scene category */,
  "scene_complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity level of the scene */,
  "scene_type" TEXT /* Type of the scene (e.g., emergency, routine) */,
  "scene_location" TEXT /* Location of the scene (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_categories" (
  "object_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object category */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object category */,
  "object_size" TEXT /* Size of the object (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., human, vehicle) */,
  "object_behavior" TEXT /* Typical behaviors of the object (e.g., static, moving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "scene_cat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scene category used in the simulation */,
  "object_cat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object category used in the simulation */,
  "response" INTEGER /* The AI's response to the simulation scenario */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the AI's response */,
  "performance_level" INTEGER /* Performance level of the AI model */,
  "simulation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in seconds */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was run */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the AI to respond */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the AI's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_scene_cat_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_cat_id") REFERENCES scene_categories ("scene_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_performance_level FOREIGN KEY ("performance_level") REFERENCES performance_levels ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_response FOREIGN KEY ("response") REFERENCES response_types ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_object_cat_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_cat_id") REFERENCES object_categories ("object_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_types" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of response */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the AI's response */,
  "response_complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity level of the response */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the response (e.g., immediate, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_metrics" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* The accuracy score of the AI's response */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the accuracy metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_levels" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance level */,
  "performance_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance level */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the AI model */,
  "performance_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the performance level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., run, analyze) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the simulation's results */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation configuration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Details of the simulation configuration */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_configurations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
